cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Agentforce 2.0: What Actually Changed from 1.0'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Agentforce 1.0' soft red/grey with blocks for 'single-agent handoff', 'prompt-heavy reasoning', 'limited orchestration visibility', and tangled arrows between Agent, Flow, Apex Action, Data Cloud. RIGHT COLUMN 'Agentforce 2.0 Winter 26' soft green/blue with blocks for 'multi-agent orchestration', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'custom reasoning steps', 'native Data Cloud vector search'. Central glowing node 'Agentforce 2.0 Orchestrator' with clean straight lines to Sales Agent, Service Agent, Compliance Agent, Knowledge Agent. Bottom speedometer labeled 'Fewer brittle handoffs'. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images: System architecture diagram: 'Agentforce 2.0 Multi-Agent Orchestration in Winter 26'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Agentforce 2.0 Multi-Agent Orchestration'. Subtitle 'From one overloaded agent to governed workflow participants'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Conversation Layer' pastel blue: modules 'Customer Message', 'Service Console', 'Experience Cloud Portal'. LAYER 2 'Agent Layer' pastel green: modules 'Intake Agent', 'Knowledge Agent', 'Eligibility Agent', 'Compliance Agent', 'Execution Agent'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Data Layer' pastel purple: modules 'Case', 'Account', 'Entitlement', 'Order', 'Data Cloud Vector Search'. Central node 'Agentforce 2.0 Orchestrator' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'MuleSoft APIs' and 'External Warranty System'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance and Audit': sub-modules 'Reasoning Trace', 'Action Logs', 'Human Approval', 'Policy Guardrails' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.

Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Agentforce 1.0 vs Agentforce 2.0 Winter 26'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Agentforce 1.0 Pattern' soft red/grey, bold blue-grey header box: blocks for 'one broad service agent', 'large prompt with mixed policies', 'manual Flow handoffs', 'hard-to-debug action choice' each with warning icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled lines between Prompt, Flow, Apex, Knowledge, Case Update. RIGHT COLUMN 'Agentforce 2.0 Pattern' soft green/blue, bright blue header box: blocks for 'multi-agent orchestration', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'custom reasoning step', 'Data Cloud vector search', 'governed execution'. Central glowing node 'Orchestrator' with clean straight lines to Intake Agent, Policy Agent, Eligibility Agent, Compliance Agent, Execution Agent. Speedometer labeled CONTROL pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
